_comment: Pre-2022 VAT Rebate reclassification amounts for Level T adjustments. Before 2022, VAT Rebate expenses were embedded inside COGS rather than recorded as a separate VAT line. These values move that amount out of COGS and into 'VAT Expenses from Rebate (A)' — Net Income is unchanged. All values are in BDT. Update these with exact figures from physical records when available.
